summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EcoPilot AI-Powered Carbon Tracker app. All core features tested successfully including user registration/login, dashboard functionality, pre-purchase carbon analysis, post-purchase logging, impact visualization, and AI integration.

resolved_issues.issue: KeyError: 'password' during login - password field missing from user document
resolved_issues.fix_applied: Modified registration endpoint to properly store hashed password in database document

passed_tests: User registration with sustainability goals selection
Dashboard displays user stats (total logs, carbon saved, eco score)
Pre-purchase inquiry with AI carbon footprint analysis
Post-purchase manual logging with AI analysis
Impact dashboard with carbon trend visualization
Navigation between all pages (Landing, Auth, Dashboard, Pre-Purchase, Post-Purchase, Impact)
AI integration for carbon analysis using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini
